title: Dark Sky Forecast Response
description: JSON Schema for the top-level response object returned by the Dark Sky Forecast API and Time Machine endpoint.

latitude.description: Latitude of the request location in decimal degrees.

longitude.description: Longitude of the request location in decimal degrees.

timezone.description: IANA timezone name for the requested location (e.g. 'America/New_York').

offset.description: Current timezone offset in hours from UTC.

alerts.description: Array of severe weather alerts for the requested location.

Icon.description: Machine-readable icon name representing the weather conditions.

DataBlock.description: A collection of DataPoint objects over a period of time (minutes, hours, or days).

summary.description: Human-readable text summary of the data block.

DataPoint.description: A data point object containing weather observation properties for a point in time.

time.description: Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) of the data point.

sunriseTime.description: Sunrise time as Unix timestamp (daily data points only).

sunsetTime.description: Sunset time as Unix timestamp (daily data points only).

moonPhase.description: Fractional lunation number: 0=new moon, 0.25=first quarter, 0.5=full, 0.75=last quarter.

nearestStormBearing.description: Direction to nearest storm in degrees clockwise from north (currently only).

nearestStormDistance.description: Distance to nearest storm in requested units (currently only).

precipIntensity.description: Precipitation intensity in inches/hour (us/uk2/ca) or mm/hour (si).

precipIntensityMax.description: Maximum precipitation intensity during the period (daily only).

precipIntensityMaxTime.description: Unix timestamp of maximum precipitation intensity (daily only).

precipAccumulation.description: Accumulated snowfall in inches (or cm for si) during the period.

precipType.description: Type of precipitation. Only present when precipIntensity > 0.

temperature.description: Air temperature. Fahrenheit for us units; Celsius for si/ca/uk2.

apparentTemperature.description: Apparent ('feels like') temperature in the requested units.

temperatureHighTime.description: Unix timestamp of daytime high temperature (daily only).

temperatureLowTime.description: Unix timestamp of overnight low temperature (daily only).

temperatureMinTime.description: Unix timestamp of daily minimum temperature (daily only).

temperatureMaxTime.description: Unix timestamp of daily maximum temperature (daily only).

apparentTemperatureHighTime.description: Unix timestamp of daytime high apparent temperature (daily only).

apparentTemperatureLowTime.description: Unix timestamp of overnight low apparent temperature (daily only).

dewPoint.description: Dew point temperature in the requested units.

windSpeed.description: Wind speed in the requested units.

windGust.description: Wind gust speed in the requested units.

windGustTime.description: Unix timestamp of maximum wind gust (daily only).

windBearing.description: Wind direction in degrees clockwise from north.

cloudCover.description: Fraction of sky covered by clouds, between 0 and 1.

uvIndexTime.description: Unix timestamp of maximum UV index (daily only).

visibility.description: Average visibility in miles (us/uk2) or kilometers (si/ca), capped at 10.

ozone.description: Columnar density of total atmospheric ozone in Dobson units.

Alert.description: Severe weather alert issued by a governmental weather authority.

title.description: Short text summary of the alert.

regions.description: Names of regions covered by the alert.

time.description: Unix timestamp of the alert's onset.

expires.description: Unix timestamp when the alert expires.

description.description: Detailed text description of the alert.

uri.description: HTTP URI linking to the full text of the alert.

Flags.description: Metadata about the request including data sources used.

sources.description: Machine-readable identifiers of weather data sources used.

nearest-station.description: Distance to nearest weather station in requested units.
